summary.narrative: Two-term mayor focused on economic development and migrant services. Criticized for vague platforms early in career; later demonstrated action on border/asylum issues and business recruitment.
summary.grade_rationale: Documented accomplishments in business recruitment and migrant facility coordination; limited specificity on campaign promises; veto record suggests fiscal conservatism but mixed priorities.

promises.normalized: Attract new companies and business investment to El Paso
Expand services and infrastructure for asylum seekers and migrant processing

data_gaps: Specific campaign platform documents from 2020/2021 election unavailable
Detailed outcome metrics for business recruitment initiatives lacking
Complete veto record and rationale for 2021-2025 term incomplete
Quantified accomplishments on migrant services and housing absent
No primary sources on 2013-2017 mayoral performance for comparison
